
```{r croprasters, echo=FALSE, cache=TRUE}

library(terra)
library(dplyr)

## Read Rasters ------

dir = "H:/dev/eryn/RecExtract/SpatialData"

# 1. MVG
mvg <- terra::rast(fs::path(dir, 
                            "NVIS_AusVegetationGroup_v7", 
                            "NVIS_V7_0_AUST_RASTERS_EXT_ALL",
                            "NVIS_V7_0_AUST_EXT.gdb")) %>% 
  terra::subset("NVIS7_0_AUST_EXT_MVG_ALB")

# 2. SA_VEG_ID
saveg <- terra::rast(fs::path(dir, "VEG_SAVegetation_shp", "sa_veg_FirstDominant.tif"))

# 3. SA VEG CONDITION
vegcon <- terra::rast(fs::path(dir, "VEG_SAVegetation_shp", "sa_veg_condition.tif"))

# 4. Temperature max/min TXX TXI & Precipitation max/min PTX PTI

clim_stack <- list.files(
  fs::path(dir, "Climatology1976-2005_adj_9s"),
  pattern = "^(TXX|TXI|PTX|PTI)\\.flt$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
) %>% 
  terra::rast()

r_list <- list(mvg, saveg, vegcon, as.list(clim_stack)) %>% 
  unlist(recursive = TRUE, use.names = FALSE)

# Read vectors and crop ------

ft <- sfarrow::st_read_parquet("H:/data/vector/pia.parquet") %>% 
  terra::vect()

# function to process one raster

process_raster <- function(v, r, out_crs = "+init=EPSG:4326", res = 0.001) {
  v_rast_crs <- terra::project(v, terra::crs(r))
  r_crop <- terra::crop(r, v_rast_crs)
  r_mask <- terra::mask(r_crop, v_rast_crs)
  r_out <- terra::project(r_mask, out_crs, res = res)
  return(r_out)
}

# USG
usg_ls <- lapply(r_list, function(r) process_raster(ft[1], r, out_crs = "EPSG:4326", res = 0.001))
usg_plots <- lapply(usg_ls, plot_raster_summary)

# BP
bp_ls <- lapply(r_list, function(r) process_raster(ft[2], r, out_crs = "EPSG:4326", res = 0.001))
bp_plots <- lapply(bp_ls, plot_raster_summary)
```
